blocks.text: Vietnam Xinyuanjia – FSC® & ISO 9001 Certified Production Hub in Vietnam

Vietnam Xinyuanjia Environment Technology Co., Ltd. serves as Jinhao Xinyuan Group’s certified manufacturing hub in Bac Ninh, Vietnam.Located in Tang Tien Industrial Cluster, Viet Yen Town, Bac Giang Province, the factory specializes in packaging and decoration products for international brands.With FSC®, ISO 9001:2015, and SMETA certifications, it delivers sustainable, high-precision packaging solutions for export to Europe, North America, and Asia.
About Vietnam Xinyuanjia Environment Technology Co., Ltd.
Established as part of Jinhao Xinyuan Group’s regional expansion, the Bac Ninh facility covers over 20,000 m² of modern production space and employs more than 250 staff.
The site integrates offset printing, corrugation, lamination, die-cutting, folding, gluing, and final assembly — all in one continuous line to ensure tight quality control and short lead times.
Its location offers direct access to Hai Phong Port, providing a strong logistical advantage for export clients in FMCG, electronics, cosmetics, and food packaging sectors.
PRODUCTION CAPABILITIES

The Bac Ninh plant operates a complete production ecosystem that supports both volume manufacturing and high-end customization.Using advanced equipment from Heidelberg, Komori, and Bobst, it provides full-color printing, precise die-cutting, and clean folding-gluing across multiple material types.
Key Production Lines:
• Offset Printing: Heidelberg & Komori 4-6 color presses with GMI color calibration
Offset Printing: Heidelberg & Komori 4-6 color presses with GMI color calibration
• Die-Cutting: Bobst & YuanYi automatic die-cutting systems
Die-Cutting: Bobst & YuanYi automatic die-cutting systems
• Folding & Gluing: Jagenberg and Tiancen high-speed lines
Folding & Gluing: Jagenberg and Tiancen high-speed lines
• Corrugation: B, E, and BC flute options for balanced strength & weight
Corrugation: B, E, and BC flute options for balanced strength & weight
• Quality Control: ISTA-certified compression, drop, and stacking tests
Quality Control: ISTA-certified compression, drop, and stacking tests
All processes are managed under ISO 9001:2015 standards for consistent product reliability.

blocks.text: Certified to Global Standards
Vietnam Xinyuanjia Environment Technology Co., Ltd. adheres to international compliance systems that ensure both product safety and social responsibility.
Certifications:
• FSC® Chain of Custody Certification – Guaranteeing responsible and traceable sourcing.
FSC® Chain of Custody Certification – Guaranteeing responsible and traceable sourcing.
• ISO 9001:2015 – Certificate No. ZC25AQDB00126S, valid until June 24, 2028.
ISO 9001:2015 – Certificate No. ZC25AQDB00126S, valid until June 24, 2028.
• SMETA (Sedex ZAA600151255) – Ethical trade, worker welfare, and supply-chain transparency.
SMETA (Sedex ZAA600151255) – Ethical trade, worker welfare, and supply-chain transparency.
• CAPR (Corrective Action Plan Report) – Verified continuous improvement following SMETA audits.
CAPR (Corrective Action Plan Report) – Verified continuous improvement following SMETA audits.
Each certification is independently audited to maintain compliance with export and retail standards.

Jinhao Xinyuan Group – Regional Manufacturing Network

The Bac Ninh site operates alongside group facilities in Dongguan (China) and Saraburi (Thailand), forming a regional supply chain for corrugated boxes, folding cartons, labels, and rigid packaging.This multi-hub structure enables fast delivery, cost efficiency, and consistent quality for global clients across multiple industries.
Each factory follows unified quality standards, digital color control, and shared sustainability protocols — ensuring standardized packaging across continents.

For quotations, product inquiries, or site visits, please reach our Vietnam operations team directly.
